blocks.label: Chief complaint
blocks.text: Pusing saat bangun pagi/dari duduk, 1 minggu

blocks.label: HPI
blocks.text: Vertigo-like dizziness on position change. No palpitation, dyspnea, chest pain, nausea, tinnitus, or pre-syncope. Polydipsia-polyuria improved since on OAD.

blocks.label: Compliance
blocks.text: Good — almost no missed doses (self-reported)

blocks.label: Diet
blocks.text: Partially adherent; episodic excess white rice at family events

blocks.label: Exercise
blocks.text: Walking 3×/week × 30 min ≈ 90 min/wk (Prolanis target 150 min not yet met)

blocks.label: BP
blocks.text: 148/92 mmHg (↑ from 138/88 last month)

blocks.label: HR
blocks.text: 84/min, regular

blocks.label: Weight / Height / BMI
blocks.text: 78 kg / 168 cm / BMI 27.6 (overweight)

blocks.label: Cardiovascular
blocks.text: S1 S2 regular, no murmur

blocks.label: Pulmonary
blocks.text: Vesicular breath sounds, ronchi (−/−)

blocks.label: Abdomen
blocks.text: Soft, non-tender, liver/spleen not palpable

blocks.label: Diabetic foot exam
blocks.text: 10g monofilament intact (no neuropathy); warm extremities, dorsalis pedis pulse intact, no ulcer

blocks.label: Labs (today)
blocks.text: GDP 142 mg/dL | GD2PP 198 mg/dL | HbA1c 7.4% (↑ from 7.1%) | LDL 132 mg/dL | Creatinine 1.0 mg/dL | eGFR 78 mL/min/1.73m² | Urinalysis: Protein +1 (microalbuminuria, UACR pending)
T2DM, uncontrolled (HbA1c rising) — ICD-10: E11.9
Hypertension grade 1, uncontrolled — ICD-10: I10
Mixed dyslipidemia — ICD-10: E78.2
Overweight — ICD-10: E66.3
Suspected early diabetic nephropathy (microalbuminuria, eGFR preserved) — ICD-10: E11.21 (candidate, pending UACR)
Probable orthostatic hypotension (dizziness on standing, on multi-antihypertensive regimen) — ICD-10: I95.1

blocks.label: Pharmacology (continue)
blocks.text: Metformin 500 mg PO TID after meals | Glimepiride 2 mg PO OD AM before meal | Amlodipine 5 mg PO OD AM | Captopril 25 mg PO BID before meals | Simvastatin 20 mg PO OD PM | Aspirin 80 mg PO OD

blocks.label: Conditional change
blocks.text: Captopril 25 mg BID → Lisinopril 10 mg OD if BP remains uncontrolled next visit

blocks.label: Non-pharmacological
blocks.text: Slow rise from supine/seated (count 30s) | Fluid intake 1.5 L/day | DM diet 1700 kcal/day, increase vegetables and lean protein | Home BP monitoring AM + PM × 1 week

blocks.label: Follow-up
blocks.text: Next visit: 1 month (Prolanis) | Repeat: HbA1c, lipid panel, UACR | Patient brings home BP log and medication log
